import React from 'react';
import Dashboard from './Home/Dashboard';
import { FaEdit } from 'react-icons/fa';
import { usePage } from '@inertiajs/react';

const Products = () => {

    const props = usePage().props;
    console.log(props);

    // const products = [
    //     {
    //         id: 1,
    //         name: 'iPhone 15 Pro',
    //         price: '$999',
    //         image: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
    //     },
    //     {
    //         id: 2,
    //         name: 'MacBook Air M2',
    //         price: '$1199',
    //         image: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
    //     },
    // ];

    const products = props.products.data;

    return (
        <div>
            <div className='flex justify-between items-center mb-6'>
                <h1 className="mb-6 text-2xl font-bold">Product Management</h1>
                <button className='bg-green-600 px-4 py-2'>New Project</button>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
                {products.map((product) => (
                    <div
                        key={product.id}
                        className="overflow-hidden relative rounded-2xl border bg-white shadow-sm transition hover:shadow-lg"
                    >
                        <img
                            src={product.image}
                            alt={product.name}
                            className="h-48 w-full cursor-pointer object-cover transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out hover:scale-105"
                        />

                        <div className="p-4">
                            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">
                                {product.name}
                            </h2>

                            <p className="text-xl font-bold text-indigo-600">
                                {product.price}
                            </p>

                            <button className="mt-4 w-full cursor-pointer rounded-lg bg-black py-2 text-white transition hover:bg-gray-800">
                                View Product
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <button className="absolute top-2 right-2 rounded-full bg-white p-2 text-gray-600 shadow transition hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-800">
                            <FaEdit />
                        </button>
                    </div>
                ))}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

Products.layout = (page: React.ReactNode) => <Dashboard>{page}</Dashboard>;

export default Products;
